ip_outcome_note: Confirmed Pansage. Card name, type (Grass), flavor text, and depicted figure (small green monkey with leafy head tuft) match canonical Pansage (National Pokedex no. 511). No ambiguity.

trivia_bullets.text: This is the second Pansage print in the corpus. The earlier print is BUS-12 (Burning Shadows, 2017), illustrated by Shigenori Negishi. This Darkness Ablaze version (2020) is illustrated by Mina Nakai. The BUS-12 card carries a different flavor text — 'It shares the leaf on its head with weary-looking Pokemon. These leaves are known to relieve stress.' — and the single attack Vine Whip, compared to this version's two-attack layout (Seed Bomb + Bite). [PokemonTCG.io API (swsh3-6) and (sm3-12)]

Pansage is National Pokedex no. 511, the Grass-type member of the elemental monkey trio (Pansage/Pansear/Panpour) introduced in Generation V (Black and White, 2010). All three are found in the Unova region, and each appears exclusively in one game version in the main series — Pansage in Black, with the others version-exclusive in White. [PokemonTCG.io API; Bulbapedia: Pansage via WebSearch]
"It's good at finding berries and gathers them from all over. It's kind enough to share them with friends." `[PokemonTCG.io API flavor_text field (swsh3-6)]`

related_cards.note: Prior corpus print; different artist (Shigenori Negishi), different flavor text, single-attack layout
